# Planck 2018 CMB Data

## Source
- **Paper:** Planck Collaboration (2020), "Planck 2018 results. I."
- **URL:** https://pla.esac.esa.int/
- **Version:** Planck 2018 (PR3)

## Files
- Binned TT power spectrum (D_ell vs multipole ell)
- Peak positions from Planck best-fit analysis

## CMB Peak Positions (Planck 2018)

| Peak | Multipole ell |
|------|--------------|
| 1 | 220.0 |
| 2 | 537.5 |
| 3 | 810.8 |
| 4 | 1120.9 |
| 5 | 1444.2 |
| 6 | 1776.0 |
| 7 | 2081.0 |

## Data Contamination Note
Planck data processing (foreground subtraction, beam deconvolution, binning) assumes LCDM transfer functions. UDT fits against this data include an unknown systematic from the LCDM-calibrated processing pipeline. A model-independent CMB reduction would be needed for a fair comparison.

  author = {{Planck Collaboration}},
  title = {Planck 2018 results. I.},
  journal = {A\&A},
  year = {2020},
